promo.title: 1-Month Premium Pass
promo.text: Skip the trial limits. Get full 4K access for 30 days at a massive discount.

hero.subhead: Enjoy Sports, Movies & Live TV in 4K — Anytime, Anywhere

channelList.subtitle: Explore our dynamic channel directory with real-time updates. Find your favorite content effortlessly and stay connected to the best entertainment options available.

items.title: 8K Ultra HD Streaming
items.description: Experience breathtaking clarity. Our platform auto-optimizes your resolution for a vivid, bandwidth-friendly viewing experience.

items.title: Zero-Buffering Technology
items.description: Say goodbye to lag. Backed by premium global servers, we guarantee 99.9% uptime even during peak live events.

items.title: Massive Global Library
items.description: Unlock 15,000+ live channels across 50+ countries, plus dive into a daily-updated VOD library of box office hits and series.

items.title: Watch on Your Terms
items.description: Sync seamlessly across devices, from your Smart TV to your phone, and never miss a moment with our 14-Day Cloud DVR.

items.title: Built-In Privacy
items.description: Stream securely. Our built-in routing prevents ISP speed throttling and effortlessly bypasses restrictive geo-blocks.

items.title: 24/7 Priority Support
items.description: Skip the automated bots. Get lightning-fast support from real specialists via live chat or WhatsApp.
